creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
It seems that 'my' directory is not very special after all.

I wanted to repeat this 'problem' with 'common' data as /usr/ports or /usr/src and as it seems the problem is the same with copying these to msdosfs.

# for I in `jot 30`; do cp -vr /usr/ports /media/mmcsd0/ports.${I}; done
# for I in `jot 30`; do cp -vr /usr/src   /media/mmcsd0/src.${I}; done

... but I did not have to wait for all these to copy ... it failed upon first copy of ports.1 dir, as below:
